summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Pro tier with Stripe integration and Emergent Google OAuth authentication. All backend APIs pass (18/18 tests). Frontend UI fully functional with proper auth flow, protected routes, and Stripe checkout integration.
passed_tests: GET /api/pricing returns correct free and pro tier info ($29.99, 30 movies, 3 collections limits)
GET /api/auth/me returns user data with valid session token
GET /api/user/limits returns user limits when authenticated (movies: 0/30, collections: 0/3)
POST /api/stripe/create-checkout-session creates checkout session for authenticated user
Login page renders correctly with Google OAuth button
Protected routes redirect to /login when not authenticated
Authenticated user can access protected routes with session cookie
Sidebar shows 'Upgrade to Pro' button for free users
Upgrade page displays pricing cards correctly (Free $0, Pro $29.99)
Upgrade page shows current usage (movies and collections)
Clicking 'Upgrade to Pro' redirects to Stripe checkout
User menu shows 'Upgrade to Pro' and 'Sign out' options
Sidebar navigation works (Library, Collections, Directories, Settings)
seed_data_creation: Created test user and session in MongoDB: user_id=test-user-1770921244182, session_token=test_session_persistent_1770921307628
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pro tier with Stripe integration fully tested. Test user created with free tier. Stripe checkout redirects to real Stripe sandbox. Auth uses Emergent Google OAuth with session cookies. All endpoints properly protected with 401 responses for unauthenticated requests.
